title: DrChrono - Mobile EHR with Electronic Prior Authorization
problem: Prior authorization is manual, slow, and delays care. Providers need integrated EHR with electronic prior auth submission.
solution: All-in-one EHR with electronic prior authorization. Streamlined prior auth requests with automated submission and processing. Mobile-first EHR for iPhone and iPad. Integrated medical billing and RCM.
technology: Mobile EHR, electronic prior auth APIs, clearinghouse integration
traction_signals: First EHR apps for iPad and iPhone
varden_fit: HIGH — DrChrono proves electronic prior auth can be embedded in EHR workflow. European providers need similar integration.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Electronic prior authorization embedded in EHR is essential. European systems lack this integration.
